overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk bar or nightclub. The environment features industrial metal architecture, pervasive teal and cyan neon lighting, holographic displays, and various NPCs socializing in seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar entrance corridor with bar counter

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the entrance corridor, passing by the bar area on the right

notable_agents.action: woman standing against the wall near the bar counter, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: metal grate flooring with geometric patterns covering the ground
long bar counter with stools and bottles visible behind glass
large circular metallic wall decorations behind the bar area
exposed ventilation ducts and pipes running along the ceiling
cyan neon light strips illuminating the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a walk through a narrow corridor in a cyberpunk bar. The floor is metal grating, and cyan neon strips line the walls. A bar counter with circular metallic wall decorations is visible on the right, where a woman stands observing. Industrial pipes run along the ceiling, contributing to the gritty aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lounge area with seating and holographic displays

events.description: exits narrow corridor and enters the open lounge area with couches and tables

agents.ego_description: navigating through the main lounge, moving between groups of standing NPCs and seating areas

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing in conversation near the center of the lounge

entered.detail: curved leather banquette seating arranged around low tables
floating holographic displays showing advertisements above the seating area
rectangular low tables with glowing edges positioned between couches
transparent glass walls separating different sections of the lounge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious lounge area with leather couches arranged around glowing low tables. Holographic screens float above displaying advertisements. Groups of NPCs stand conversing in the center while the camera navigates through the space. Glass partitions line the right side, and the lighting remains predominantly cyan neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor leading to exit with industrial details

events.description: slows slightly while passing a seated NPC on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back exit, passing a seated man on a ledge and approaching a red-lit doorway

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing sitting on a metal ledge against the glass wall

entered.detail: red-lit vending machine glowing against the back wall
exit doorway illuminated with red neon lights marking the transition to another area
large ventilation ducts and piping running along the ceiling and walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrower back corridor with industrial metal flooring and exposed ductwork. A man sits on a ledge to the left against a glass wall. The camera approaches a red-lit doorway and vending machine at the far end, transitioning from the cyan-lit lounge to an area with warmer red lighting accents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk establishment that transitions from a narrow industrial corridor into a spacious lounge before ending in a dimly lit back hallway. It begins by gliding along a metal grating floor lined with cyan neon strips and industrial piping, passing a bar counter where a woman stands among circular metallic decorations. As the corridor opens, the scene expands into a wide lounge area filled with leather couches, glowing tables, and floating holographic advertisements while the camera weaves through groups of conversing NPCs. The view then shifts back into a narrower passage characterized by exposed ductwork and glass walls, passing a man seated on a ledge. Finally, the predominantly cyan lighting gives way to warmer red accents as the camera approaches a vending machine and a red-lit doorway at the far end of the hall.
